DAMNHS.name: DAMNHS
DAMNHS.description: Carlo Bunayos gathered former public school teachers from DAMNHS, GES, and Cubay Elementary for a meaningful reunion.

Deped NIR.name: Deped NIR
Deped NIR.description: A speech was delivered by Carlo Bunayos Sales and Marketing Director, representing Lampara Publishing House, Inc., expressing full support for DepEd NIR. During Regional Brigada Eskwela Kick Off, the organization also donated over 1,000 reading materials and established a Reading Center to help strengthen literacy and numeracy in the newly established DepEd NIR.

FilAm.name: FilAm
FilAm.description: Carlo Bunayos, a member of the Association of Fil-Am Teachers of America, Inc. (AFTA) in 2025, attended the S.A.G.A 2025 Service Gala Awards held in New York City on May 25, 2025, at the Sheraton LaGuardia East Hotel. The event gathered distinguished educators and leaders, celebrating excellence in service and dedication within the Filipino community abroad. He was joined by Segundo Matias Jr., President of Lampara Publishing House, Inc. and the Precious Pages Group of Companies, along with other Lampara executives, highlighting a shared commitment to education and cultural advocacy. As part of their meaningful initiatives, they also donated Filipino reading materials to the Philippine Consulate General in New York in collaboration with Cathe Ryne Denice S. Aguilar Consul Philippine Consul General and Deputy Consul General Adrian Elmer S. Cruz. This project aims to preserve and promote Filipino culture and identity among Filipinos around the world, ensuring that wherever they may be, the spirit of being Filipino remains alive—through the support of AFTA and its dedicated officers.

San Enrique.name: San Enrique
San Enrique.description: With a heart dedicated to service, Carlo Bunayos, in his capacity as a private individual, distributed 700 food packs to families in Barangay Cubay, San Enrique, Iloilo. This meaningful initiative, known as Bulig kag Pagpalangga ni Carlo Bunayos sa Barangay Cubay, reflects his unwavering commitment to uplifting the lives of those in need. More than just an act of giving, the event embodies hope, unity, and genuine care for the community. Each food pack represents not only sustenance, but also a reminder that no family is forgotten and that kindness continues to thrive. Held annually, this initiative aims to extend consistent support to underprivileged residents, strengthening the spirit of bayanihan and inspiring others to share their blessings. Through compassion and generosity, Carlo Bunayos continues to make a lasting impact—bringing comfort, dignity, and renewed hope to every household in Barangay Cubay.
